mods.name: Performance Intake
mods.description: An upgraded intake for the 2.0T FSI or TFSI engine improves turbo spool sound and provides a small increase in airflow.
mods.installNotes: Remove stock airbox. Install new intake tube and filter. The 8J shares the MQB platform intake design with the Golf. 15 minutes. No tune required.

mods.name: Catback Exhaust
mods.description: A performance catback adds character to the 2.0T engine and reduces backpressure for small gains when tuned.
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on from the downpipe flange back. Dual exit or quad tip options. No cutting required. Hangs on factory mounts. 1 hour on jack stands.

mods.name: Lowering Springs
mods.description: Lower the TT by 20–25mm for a sportier stance and reduced body roll. The TT already has a low center of gravity.
mods.installNotes: Spring compressor needed. Replace all four corners. Magnetic ride-equipped cars need specific springs. Alignment required. Expect 20mm front, 25mm rear drop.

mods.name: APR ECU Tune
mods.description: APR Stage 1 tune adds 60–80hp to the 2.0T with zero hardware changes. The 2.0T platform responds incredibly well to software tuning.
mods.partNumbers: APR Stage 1 ECU Upgrade, Unitronic Stage 1
mods.installNotes: Flash via OBD-II at an APR dealer, or via Cobb AccessPort with Unitronic. Requires 93 octane. Massive torque increase in the mid-range. Stage 2 requires downpipe.

mods.name: Performance Downpipe
mods.description: A 3-inch downpipe replaces the restrictive factory unit for faster turbo spool and significant power gains when paired with Stage 2 tune.
mods.partNumbers: CTS Turbo CTS-EXH-DP-0003, USP Motorsports Catted DP
mods.installNotes: Access from below on a lift. Pre-soak turbo-to-downpipe bolts. O2 sensor spacer needed for catless to prevent CEL. Must retune to Stage 2 after install. 2 hours.

mods.name: Upgraded Intercooler
mods.description: Replace the small factory intercooler with a larger front-mount unit for consistent power delivery and reduced heat soak.
mods.installNotes: Remove front bumper cover. Unbolt stock intercooler and transfer charge pipe connections. New unit uses factory mounting points. 2–3 hours. Critical for Stage 2+ tunes.

mods.name: Turbo Upgrade (K04)
mods.description: Upgrade from the stock K03 turbo to a K04 for significantly higher boost capability. Pushes the 2.0T to 300+ hp.
mods.installNotes: Remove stock turbo and exhaust manifold. K04 is a bolt-on replacement. Requires upgraded injectors, HPFP internals, intercooler, and K04-specific tune. Upgraded clutch on manual cars. 10+ hours.

mods.name: Coilover Suspension
mods.description: Adjustable coilovers for precise ride height and damping control. The TT's short wheelbase makes it very responsive to suspension tuning.
mods.partNumbers: KW V3 35210075, ST Suspension XTA Plus 3 18210875
mods.installNotes: Full strut replacement at all corners. Magnetic ride cars need MR delete module. Set ride height 20mm below stock for a balanced look. Full alignment required.
